title: SkLunar
description: A Skript Addon to interact with Lunar Client.
body:
SkLunar is a [Skript Addon](https://github.com/SkriptLang/Skript) that allows servers to interact with the [Lunar Client](https://www.lunarclient.com) [Apollo Server API](https://lunarclient.dev).

# 📥 Installation Guide
To be able to use SkLunar, your server needs to be on Spigot or Paper. Paper is preferred. You also need to download the latest version of Skript from their [releases page](https://github.com/skriptlang/skript/releases) as well as the Apollo plugin from their [downloads page](https://lunarclient.dev/apollo/downloads).

# 🐛 How to Report Issues
Please use the [issue tracker](https://github.com/tarna/SkLunar/issues) linked at the top of the page to report bugs, crashes, and other issues. Make sure to also provide any errors you may recieve when reloading a Skript as well as in the server console.

# Features
This addon allows you to interact with the different Lunar modules in the Apollo Server API which are:
- Beam
- Border
- Chat
- Colored Fire
- Combat
- Cooldown
- Entity
- Glint
- Glow
- Hologram
- Limb
- Mod Settings
- Nametag
- Nick Hider
- Notification
- Packet Enrichment
- Rich Presense
- Saturation
- Server Rule
- Staff Mod
- Stopwatch
- Team
- Title
- TNT Countdown
- Transfer
- Vignette
- Waypoint

# Documentation
You can view a full list of all the current elements and upcoming changes on the [docs site](https://tarna.gitbook.io/sklunar).
